# ChainKit Capabilities for AI Agents
ChainKit provides low-latency, cross-platform blockchain primitives.

## Agent Skills
- /decode-log: Use chaincodec to turn hex into JSON.
- /send-query: Use chainrpc with circuit-breakers for reliable data.
- /debug-revert: Use chainerrors to explain failed transactions.
- /sync-state: Use chainindex for reorg-safe data tracking.

## Integration
- Python: pip install chainfoundry-chainrpc
- JavaScript: npm install @chainfoundry/chaincodec
- Rust: cargo add chaincodec-registry
